# tui

```go
import "github.com/hoangharry-tm/zerotrust/internal/output/tui"
```

Package tui implements the Bubble Tea interactive TUI for zerotrust. It is selected via \-\-output tui and renders a two\-panel layout:

- Left panel: pipeline stage progress \(always visible\)
- Right panel: tabbed content \(log, findings, summary, suppressed, patches\)

Two states:

- scanning: live progress \+ log stream
- done: navigable findings list \+ detail pane

## type [TUIRenderer](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/internal/output/tui/model.go#L97-L100>)

TUIRenderer wraps the Bubble Tea program and implements output.Renderer.

<a name="NewTUIRenderer"></a>
### func [NewTUIRenderer](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/internal/output/tui/model.go#L103>)

```go
func NewTUIRenderer() *TUIRenderer
```

NewTUIRenderer constructs a TUIRenderer. Call Render to start the Bubble Tea loop.

<a name="TUIRenderer.Render"></a>
### func \(\*TUIRenderer\) [Render](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/internal/output/tui/model.go#L113>)

```go
func (r *TUIRenderer) Render(_ context.Context, ch <-chan output.Event) error
```

Render implements output.Renderer. It starts the Bubble Tea event loop and blocks until the user quits or the scan finishes.
